title: Meta Graph API User
description: Represents a Facebook or Instagram user account as returned by the Graph API User node. Covers identity, demographics, profile details, and engagement metrics.

id.description: The unique numeric identifier for the user, returned as a string by the Graph API.

name.description: The full name of the user.

first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

middle_name.description: The middle name of the user.

name_format.description: The user's name formatted to correctly handle Chinese, Japanese, or Korean ordering.

short_name.description: Shortened, informal name for the user.

email.description: The primary email address listed in the user's profile. Requires the email permission.

birthday.description: The user's birthday in MM/DD/YYYY format. Requires the user_birthday permission.

gender.description: The gender selected by the user. This is a free-form string; common values are 'male', 'female', and 'non-binary'.

link.description: A link to the user's Facebook profile.

height.description: The height of the picture in pixels.

is_silhouette.description: Whether the profile picture is the default silhouette.

width.description: The width of the picture in pixels.

locale.description: The user's locale as a language-country code string, e.g. en_US.

timezone.description: The user's timezone offset from UTC, expressed as a number (e.g. -5).

location.description: The user's current location as entered on their profile.

id.description: The Graph API ID of the location Page.

hometown.description: The user's hometown as entered on their profile.

id.description: The Graph API ID of the hometown Page.

age_range.description: The age range of the user as a min/max bracket.

min.description: The lower bound of the age range.

max.description: The upper bound of the age range.

languages.description: Languages the user has added to their profile.

installed.description: Whether the user has the application installed.

is_guest_user.description: Whether the user account is a guest/limited account.

meeting_for.description: What the user is interested in meeting for (e.g. networking, dating).

updated_time.description: The last time the user's profile was updated, in ISO 8601 format.

friends.description: The user's friends list (summary only by default).

instagram_business_account.description: The linked Instagram Business or Creator account, if any.
